name: The Harmony Golf Club
address: 274 N Goodman St Suite D308, Rochester, NY 14610
about: The Harmony Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Rochester, NY. The facility provides a private, climate-controlled environment for golfers to practice and play on virtual courses year-round. It features high-tech simulator equipment with 2 high-speed cameras for shot tracking, a 12' hittable HD screen, and realistic golf mats designed to mimic the feel of a fairway. The venue offers private, customizable experiences for individuals and groups, with a focus on providing detailed feedback and data to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: High-speed cameras provide instant shot feedback with in-depth data on ball speed, spin rates, and launch angles
12-foot HD hittable screen can withstand ball speeds up to 250 mph for a realistic simulation experience
Real-feel mats with Teeline turf mimic a real-grass feel and provide accurate feedback
Private, indoor environment allows for golf year-round regardless of weather conditions
Accommodates groups up to four participants for social golf experiences

food_and_drink.notes: Visitors are welcome to bring their own food or non-alcoholic drinks. Several restaurants are available in the Village Gate Square for before or after sessions.
BYOB is not mentioned as an option. The FAQ only mentions bringing non-alcoholic drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two high-speed cameras providing instant shot feedback with high accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own set of golf clubs. The venue provides plenty of golf balls and several choices of tees designed for golf simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you're welcome to bring your own food or non-alcoholic drinks. The venue also recommends eating before or after your session at one of the many great restaurants in the Village Gate Square.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard virtual golf session at The Harmony Golf Club typically lasts 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue accommodates groups and is welcoming to all skill levels, but there are no specific mentions of children's activities or equipment in the provided content.
